name: Luck
description: A 3d6 biography table of chance, providence, bad timing, and narrow escape.

results.description: Misfortune seems to arrive just before opportunity does.
results.name: luck

results.description: A stroke of bad luck ruined something that should have gone well.
results.name: luck

results.description: You were present when fortune favored everyone but you.
results.name: luck

results.description: Good things often seem to slip from your grasp at the last moment.
results.name: luck

results.description: You learned to expect little from chance.
results.name: luck

results.description: You have survived more by caution than by grace.
results.name: luck

results.description: Fortune has disappointed you, but never completely abandoned you.
results.name: luck

results.description: Chance has treated you much as it treats most people.
results.name: luck

results.description: Once or twice, events broke your way without explanation.
results.name: luck

results.description: You have a habit of being in the right place just late enough to survive.
results.name: luck

results.description: A fortunate accident spared you trouble you did not foresee.
results.name: luck

results.description: Opportunity has found you in unlikely moments.
results.name: luck

results.description: You escaped danger by means too narrow to trust twice.
results.name: luck

results.description: Fortune has favored you often enough that others remark on it.
results.name: luck

results.description: A remarkable stroke of luck altered the course of your life.
results.name: luck

results.description: You survived or gained something by means no sensible person would have expected.
results.name: luck
